title: ranunculus simulans
intro: Ranunculus simulans, also known as western buttercup or small-flowered buttercup, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Ranunculaceae family, characterized by its small, yellow or greenish flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Ranunculus simulans include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant activity. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and tinctures, are used to treat various health issues, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity.
